Summary: The Original Piano Black PlayStation 3 launched Sony's seventh-generation console with Blu-ray Disc support, HD gaming and online services. Its glossy finish became the signature look of the launch hardware.
The Ceramic White PlayStation 3 was one of Sony's earliest official colour variants, offering the same hardware as the standard model in an elegant white finish.
The Satin Silver PlayStation 3 featured a premium metallic finish and became one of the most recognisable official PS3 colour variants.
The PlayStation 3 Slim redesigned the original console with a smaller, quieter and more energy-efficient form factor while retaining full compatibility with the PS3 library.
The Classic White PS3 Slim brought a clean white finish to Sony's redesigned console and became a popular retail colour option.
The Satin Silver PS3 Slim offered the redesigned console in a premium metallic finish while maintaining identical hardware.

Edition Name: PS3 Slim Final Fantasy XIII Lightning Edition
Official Name: Sony PlayStation 3 Slim Final Fantasy XIII Lightning Edition
Summary: Released to celebrate Final Fantasy XIII, the Lightning Edition featured exclusive artwork inspired by the game's protagonist and is one of the most sought-after PS3 limited editions.

Edition Name: PS3 Slim Tales of Xillia X Edition
Official Name: Sony PlayStation 3 Slim Tales of Xillia X Edition
Summary: This official limited edition console celebrated Tales of Xillia with exclusive artwork and matching packaging for fans of the series.

Edition Name: PS3 Slim Ni No Kuni Magical Edition
Official Name: Sony PlayStation 3 Slim Ni No Kuni Magical Edition
Summary: Released alongside Ni No Kuni, the Magical Edition featured exclusive gold artwork and themed branding inspired by the game.
The PlayStation 3 Super Slim was the final redesign of the PS3, introducing a sliding disc cover while further reducing size, weight and power consumption.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 3 Super Slim Classic White
Summary: The Classic White PS3 Super Slim offered Sony's final PS3 hardware revision in a clean white finish.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 3 Super Slim Azurite Blue
Summary: Azurite Blue was one of the best-known official colour variants of the PlayStation 3 Super Slim, offering a vibrant blue finish.

Official Name: Sony PlayStation 3 Super Slim Garnet Red
Summary: The Garnet Red PlayStation 3 Super Slim featured a deep metallic red finish and was released in selected markets.
